overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The character moves from an open plaza with police barriers, past large digital billboards and Asian-inspired architecture, into a covered street arcade with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with police barriers and palm trees

events.description: character turns left around concrete barriers and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: character navigates around yellow and black striped barriers, turning left toward the open plaza

notable_agents.action: police officer standing near a futuristic white police vehicle with blue emergency lights

entered.detail: yellow and black striped concrete barriers blocking off the plaza area
futuristic white police car with glowing blue lights parked near the barriers
tall palm trees lining the background of the plaza
modern multi-story building with reflective blue glass facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban plaza with concrete barriers and a police vehicle visible ahead. The character turns left around the barriers, revealing palm trees and modern glass buildings in the background. A police officer stands near the vehicle as the character begins walking forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with public benches and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past green and yellow benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a green and yellow bench facing the walkway

entered.detail: green and yellow public benches with people sitting
tall concrete wall with large red Japanese character graffiti and CYBER CLAWS text

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a plaza sidewalk lined with colorful benches where people are seated. A massive concrete wall with red Japanese signage appears on the right, while modern glass buildings remain visible on the left. The concrete barriers and police vehicle from the previous area fall behind as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertising displays

events.description: crowd density increases as character approaches the commercial billboard area

agents.ego_description: walking past the large red signage wall toward the prominent digital billboards

notable_agents.action: security guard in tactical gear walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall twin digital screens displaying anime-style character advertisements with 16 Flavors text
elevated curved pedestrian bridge structure connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the commercial street, passing the large red graffiti wall on the right. Twin massive digital billboards displaying anime characters become the focal point ahead. An overhead pedestrian walkway spans the left side of the frame as more pedestrians appear in the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with crosswalk leading to covered arcade entrance

events.description: character waits for vehicles then crosses the street at the crosswalk
character enters the covered street arcade from the open intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the yellow striped crosswalk and entering the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: teal futuristic sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: entrance to covered pedestrian street with overhead roof structure and neon lights
futuristic traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the intersection, waiting as a teal futuristic car passes before crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk. Large digital billboards tower on the right while the entrance to a covered arcade looms ahead. The character enters the covered area, transitioning from open sky to the sheltered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with neon lighting and storefronts

events.description: transition from golden hour sunlight to artificial neon lighting inside covered arcade

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade passing vending machines and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and white jacket walking ahead

entered.detail: overhead covered structure with skylights and red neon light strips
futuristic vending machines with glowing blue and orange displays
tall rotating digital advertisement display showing Real Water commercial

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered arcade, the lighting shifts to artificial neon with red overhead strips illuminating the walkway. The character walks past futuristic vending machines and digital advertising pillars while vehicles pass on the left side of the covered street. The environment features a mix of concrete architecture and glowing signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban plaza that gradually transitions into a sheltered, neon-lit commercial arcade. It begins by navigating around concrete police barriers and a patrol vehicle, moving past palm trees and glass buildings toward a sidewalk lined with colorful benches. As the character progresses, the open plaza shifts into a commercial street where a massive concrete wall with red Japanese signage gives way to towering digital billboards and an overhead pedestrian walkway. The scene then moves through a yellow-striped crosswalk after a teal futuristic car passes, leading the camera from the open golden-hour sky into the mouth of a covered walkway. Finally, the environment transforms into a sheltered arcade where the lighting shifts to artificial red neon strips, illuminating futuristic vending machines and digital advertising pillars.
